columns.name: LEVVARENR
columns.description: Item code or reference number for the product

columns.name: INNLESINGSNR
columns.description: Session number indicating the import process of data

columns.name: NAVNET
columns.description: Name or description of the item

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Current status of the item, such as pending, processed, etc.

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Time and date when the record was created or last updated

columns.name: DATOINNLEST
columns.description: Date when the data related to the item was imported

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: User ID or identifier of the user who created or updated the record

columns.name: OPPDATERT
columns.description: Flag indicating if the item has been updated since it was last imported
